channel.title: Teaching on Lightly Caffeinated
channel.description: Recent content in Teaching on Lightly Caffeinated

item.title: The lore of the "Shortest Length" myth
item.description: “The Planck length is the shortest length” # For some reason, the myth that the Planck length (\( \ell_P\)) is the shortest possible length, that space is pixelized and discrete, continues to persist.

item.title: The canonical way to teach quantum mechanics
item.description: Recently, during another procrastination episode, me and some colleagues got into a discussion on the correct way to teach undergraduate quantum mechanics.
